howItWorks.intro: This silver dollar melt value calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Melt Value = Silver Content (oz) × Spot Price × Quantity
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much silver is in a Morgan dollar?
faq.answer: Morgan and Peace silver dollars contain 0.7734 troy ounces (24.06 grams) of pure silver. The coin is 90% silver and 10% copper.

faq.question: Are silver dollars worth more than melt value?
faq.answer: Many silver dollars have numismatic value above melt, especially rare dates, mint marks, or coins in excellent condition. Common dates typically sell for a small premium over melt.
